data.content: Queue-filter planning complete. The queue screen uses the phase-level `queued` backend filter, and the likely fix is to add ancestor-chain inclusion for queued matches in both `src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts` and `src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts`, while preserving the existing descendant expansion for queued parents. Planned regression coverage targets `src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage.test.ts` and `src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts`, with exact-state filters kept unchanged.
